_meta.description: Drop rate / acquisition data for AQW items. Only includes items with verified rates (dev confirmed, wiki-listed percentages) or clear acquisition methods (merge, quest, shop). No guessing.

sources.note: Rates sourced from AE Design Notes (Jan 2020 Alina confirmation on Wheel of Chance rates), AQW Wiki confirmed percentages, and community-verified data only.

items._comment_wheel_of_chance: --- Wheel of Chance Quest Rewards (Dev Confirmed, Jan 2020) ---

Diamond of Nulgath.note: Dev confirmed 50% from 'Supplies to Spin the Wheel of Chance'.

Tainted Gem.note: Dev confirmed 30% from 'Supplies to Spin the Wheel of Chance'.

Dark Crystal Shard.note: Dev confirmed ~25% from 'Supplies to Spin the Wheel of Chance'. Also from 'The Assistant'.

Gem of Nulgath.note: Dev confirmed 20% from 'Supplies to Spin the Wheel of Chance'. Can also be merged.

Unidentified 10.note: Guaranteed reward from 'Supplies to Spin the Wheel of Chance' and 'The Assistant'.

Voucher of Nulgath (non-mem).note: ~3% from 'Supplies to Spin the Wheel of Chance', rarer from other quests.

Roentgenium of Nulgath.note: 1 per day from 'Void Highlord Challenge' daily quest.

Void Crystal A.note: Merge: Uni 10 x200, Gem of Nulgath x150, Dark Crystal Shard x200, Tainted Gem x200. VHL Merge Shop /tercessuinotlim.

Void Crystal B.note: Merge: Diamond of Nulgath x200, Blood Gem x30, Totem x15, Elder's Blood x2. VHL Merge Shop /tercessuinotlim.

Blood Gem of the Archfiend.note: 100% quest reward from 'Kiss the Void', 'Bloody Chaos', 'Forge Blood Gems for Nulgath'.

Totem of Nulgath.note: 100% from 'Voucher Item: Totem of Nulgath' quest (requires Voucher non-mem + 60 Essences). Also from 'The Refreshing Deal'.

Cubes.note: 100% drop from Box Guardian, Grizzlespit, Sneevil, Sneeviltron at /boxes.

Defeated Makai.note: 100% temp drop from Dark Makai when quest is accepted.

Fiend Token.note: Guaranteed quest reward from 'Assisting Drudgen' and 'Time is Money'.

Dark Potion.note: 100% from 'The Dark Box' quest. Requires Dark Box + Dark Key from Treasure Chests.

Blood Cloak.note: Buy for 100,000 Gold from Yulgar's Inn, Nulgath Diamond Shop, etc.

Essence of Nulgath.note: ~10% monster drop from Dark Makai. Primary farming method for Totems.

Barium.note: Choose as reward from 'Mine Crafting' daily quest at /necropolis.

Copper.note: Choose as reward from 'Mine Crafting' daily quest at /necropolis.

Silver.note: Choose as reward from 'Mine Crafting' daily quest at /necropolis.

Gold.note: Choose as reward from 'Mine Crafting' daily quest at /necropolis.

Platinum.note: Choose as reward from 'Mine Crafting' daily quest at /necropolis.

Aluminum.note: Choose as reward from 'Mine Crafting' daily quest at /necropolis.

Spirit Orb.note: Guaranteed from 'Essential Essences' / Fragment quests at /battleunderb.

Loyal Spirit Orb.note: Merge: 100 Spirit Orbs in Light Merge shop.

Bright Aura.note: Guaranteed from 'Finding Fragments with the Blinding Bow'. Also merge: 50 Loyal Spirit Orbs.

Brilliant Aura.note: Guaranteed from 'Finding Fragments with the Blinding Mace'.

Blinding Aura.note: ~1% rare reward from any 'Finding Fragments' quest.

Bone Dust.note: 100% drop from Imperial Noxus at /necroproject (~40 per kill).

Legion Token.note: ~4-5% from Axeros' Brooch in 'First Class Entertainment'. Also 100% from 'Undead Champion Recruitment' (10 LTs).

Void Aura.note: 50/day from 'The Encroaching Shadows' (non-mem). 100/day from 'Glimpse into the Dark' (mem). Need 7,500 total.

Barium of Doom.note: Merge: Barium x1 + Void Aura x50 at NSoD Shop in /shadowfall.

Runes of Awe.note: 0.1–0.5% from Chaos Lords. Up to ~2% from Ultra Tibicenas.

Light Guardian Spirit Blade.note: 0.5% confirmed from Mysterious Spirit at /lightguard. Members only.

Legion Revenant.note: Not a drop. Complete all 4 Legion Fealty quests.

Void Highlord.note: Not a drop. Requires 15 Roentgeniums (daily) + Void Crystal A + B.

Necrotic Sword of Doom.note: Not a drop. Requires 7,500 Void Auras + reagents.

Dragon of Time.note: Not a drop. Questline from Cronar at /yulgar.

Lord of Order.note: Not a drop. 10 daily quests from Mirror Drakath at /battleoff.

Yami no Ronin.note: Not a drop. Questline from Dage at /darkally.

Archfiend DoomLord.note: Not a drop. Merge requiring extensive Nulgath reagents.

Blade of Awe.note: Not a drop. Valencia's questline at /museum.

Radiant Goddess of War.note: Not a drop. Requires 7 prerequisite armors + badge quest.

Archmage.note: Not a drop. Book of Archmage questline.
